title: 1.21.9 Dyes
description: Changes the dye texture to match the dye texture released in the new preview
body:
Changes the textures of dyes from the textures in the new Minecraft Preview not necessary after 1.21.9 or the snapshots




![All the dyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aeb8d46b2e5c34acfe659d8fb858be5226f32bac.png)





*Only compatible for 1.20.2-1.21.8 soon more"
